speaker: MATT
raw_text: No, never! Last we left off  The Mighty Nein, following their thread of information, in pursuit of the source of the strange sphere that Fjord had come into the possession of-- that seemed to tie in some way, shape or form to the magical powers he had been slowly learning to control and manifest-- led you to southward to the Menagerie Coast where you commandeered a ship named the Mist, which you then renamed the Mistake, hired a crew and made your way south-southeast towards the island of Urukaxl to follow the apparent source of this note that seemed to have some information about where it was from and where it may go. Upon approaching, you were greeted by a much larger ship, which had shot a warning shot across the bow and demanded you to come meet the captain on their deck. You there met Captain Avantika, who had given you the options of either proving yourselves beneath her and her crew by helping them, putting yourself in danger at her behest, or they would weigh your corpses down with rocks within the nearby bay amongst the reefs. You agreed to give into these demands and an evening's stay within the ship known as the Squalleater. A little bit of thievery went into the cargo hold of the ship while Fjord had been called to the captain's quarters, where the two of you discovered that you had something in common. You both appeared to have been, from her words, the chosen of Uk'otoa, an ancient entity referred to as the leviathan that was a historical creation of Zehir, the Cloaked Serpent, before it was banished along with the rest of the gods in the Calamity and following Divergence. Now the captain, seeing herself as the chosen and seeing you in a similar state -- this kismet was grappled onto quite strongly by her-- sent you to bed with the excitement of this travel, of which you would embark upon in the next day.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're doing the rage room tomorrow.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Rage room!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's going to be fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Got almost all of it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (slow motion talking)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Benadryl.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So there's that. Anybody else have any other announcements?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The pre-orders for the Keyfish t-shirt start shipping tomorrow. Outside of that, just go to the shop. Y'all know the drill.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's fine, we're gods!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right then. Without further ado, I say it's time we go ahead and dial in for tonight's episode of Critical Role. [TV static, click] [groovy Critical Role theme]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And welcome back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Never an accident.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You are very much in tropical weather. It is warm, it is humid, and, even within maybe ten minutes of walking into the jungle, you can feel the sweat beginning to gather at the edges of your hair and the back of your coat.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Welcome to the jungle!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (singing) You're gonna die! (spoken) As Jamedi begins pushing forward into this, I would like to, one, have a marching order.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That fast, huh?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I mean, you guys are going into dangerous territory.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll be up front.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yasha's first. We're all 60 feet behind her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fjord's up front.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll be behind him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Avantika's going to ride up with Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll be behind Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jamedi's going to be scouting a little bit ahead. Nott, where are you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I guess I'll scout with Jamedi.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll be behind Jester, yeah, or with Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yasha will hold up the rear from a defensive standpoint. Caduceus, Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll be toward the back, I guess.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will walk behind Beauregard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Also, question  What is the temperature like here on this island? Are we tropical at this point?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: In this ten minutes, the blanketed heat and humidity this jungle tends to hold in is uncomfortable for those of you more used to the northern elements of this continent.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You certainly could. I don't see what harm it could bring.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm still picturing you in the stripy sailor outfit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sure, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I'll just hang on to it. If she ever is like, I don't know. If we ever need it, we got it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I walk over. Hey, are we whispering?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shh. We're whispering.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh sorry. Sorry, we're whispering.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Never mind, we were just talking about this letter, but don't show Avantika. We can use it to copy her handwriting and write a check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You never show people their stolen mail.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, of course, I should have asked you first!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Don't. Absolutely not. Keep that shit on lock.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He's rolling dice, you guys. Is the shack large enough to house our entire?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not comfortably, by any means.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We'll kind of--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We'll be quiet, we'll just stay still and look around.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. All doing pretty damn well. Continuing to coast forward for the next hour, hour and a half or so, following Jamedi's path. You can see him pulling out notes here and there and looking for different things, and occasionally he'll come upon a heavy palm tree or jungle tree that he's marked with a blade and he's keeping tabs on his marks to follow his path back to where he originally found his way. Along the way, the insects are getting really obnoxious. The buzzing itself becoming this low, droning, ever-present hum, but the bites are getting extremely obnoxious. Jamedi acknowledging, once he starts seeing it more and more, goes, "I did not find them a problem before. Perhaps they seem to enjoy your flavors more than mine."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I hope not either." She reaches out and pokes your nose and turns around.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: She booped you. Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She just gets a finger full of sweat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Was all of that for all to hear or are they off a bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They were off a bit, away from everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are we satisfied?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's go, let's keep going. Oh, what?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm good. Break time over.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right. Jamedi?" "Of course." They begin falling into the same positions, with both Jamedi and Nott taking point. Everybody make another stealth check, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Another stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Pass Without a Trace still going? It goes for how long?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It lasts for an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So yeah, it's still going for a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Blessing, who needs a Blessing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (pigeon cooing)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Technically it's still on Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll take it. Is that advantage? Better. 21.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 21? Okay.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "With a full group like this, and trying to be as quiet as possible. I give us about maybe one day. There will be a night of camping along the way."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you detect anything sinister?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's not quite alive.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's inherent, sure. Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If anything, I feel like I'm exercising an enormous amount of willpower just not to-- I mean, just doesn't seem like we're in-- there's a good advantage to dealing with this now. But, yeah, there's something weird there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thank you for letting me know. I hope you'll keep an eye on it for us.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'm keeping an eye on it. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would also say, as we're tromping through, that I would push forward and try to catch up with Jamedi, momentarily. Oh jeez, what is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Excuse me, two questions for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Looks over his shoulder at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What's that? How much further? A day's travel or more than one day until we reach our destination?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. Continuing forward for the next few hours or so, the heat is getting heavier and heavier as the afternoon sky now greets you. You find yourself stopping to eat and drink water along the way with what supplies you have available to you. The next few hours or so as it begins to get darker and darker--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was sort of my fault. I apologize.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The people that have built around this temple, their variations in how their worship-- the boons of this long-gone snake god they worship seems to apparate on their person in different ways. I've seen some with heads that are full of serpent features, patches of scales, yellow eyes, as well as some with limbs themselves transformed into snake-like forms. It is stuff of nightmares."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Like their arms but their legs are just--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You avoided them, you did not tangle with them yourself.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, that is not the work I do. I am not a fighter by any means. My job is to not be seen, to infiltrate, recover, and expedite my exit."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Makes sense. I cast Mage Armor right in front of him on myself. Thank you. See you later. I'm going back to my earlier position.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. Continuing forward for the next few hours or so, the heat is getting heavier and heavier as the afternoon sky now greets you. You find yourself stopping to eat and drink water along the way with what supplies you have available to you. The next few hours or so as it begins to get darker and darker--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was sort of my fault. I apologize.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The people that have built around this temple, their variations in how their worship-- the boons of this long-gone snake god they worship seems to apparate on their person in different ways. I've seen some with heads that are full of serpent features, patches of scales, yellow eyes, as well as some with limbs themselves transformed into snake-like forms. It is stuff of nightmares."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Like their arms but their legs are just--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You avoided them, you did not tangle with them yourself.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, that is not the work I do. I am not a fighter by any means. My job is to not be seen, to infiltrate, recover, and expedite my exit."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Makes sense. I cast Mage Armor right in front of him on myself. Thank you. See you later. I'm going back to my earlier position.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yes, it's getting steadily darker as you guys move your way through.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Continuing forward for the next few hours or so, the heat is getting heavier and heavier as the afternoon sky now greets you. You find yourself stopping to eat and drink water along the way with what supplies you have available to you. The next few hours or so as it begins to get darker and darker--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I have a question.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: With my medicine stuff, would I know anything that would help get rid of bugs and stuff? That would keep bugs away from me?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's possible. Make a nature check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no, a natural one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have no clue.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Bugs! How do they work?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not a whole lot of jungle insects in or around Nicodranas, unfortunately. Nothing catches your attention necessarily.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You said it's also darker now? As I chew on some liquorice root.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The direction you've been traveling has been a little zig-zaggy, because it's been following Jamedi's path and the marking he's making, so you're not entirely certain. It seems it could be parallel to the path you're going, but since you don't know the final destination, you're not entirely certain if it'll line up with it or not.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The path that they took away, does it line up or deviate from the general direction that we have been heading in?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The direction you've been traveling has been a little zig-zaggy, because it's been following Jamedi's path and the marking he's making, so you're not entirely certain. It seems it could be parallel to the path you're going, but since you don't know the final destination, you're not entirely certain if it'll line up with it or not.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The path that they took away, does it line up or deviate from the general direction that we have been heading in?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Good to know. Now that enough time has passed and Jamedi feels comfortable he puts his hand down and goes, "All right, we press forward. Follow me, I feel we'll have to make camp soon. There is a ruin in front that might give us some cover." Continuing on?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll join you. Anybody else? Everybody else should stay at least 20, 25 feet back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Could you give the both of us resistance?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If we get into an altercation, I'll pop both of you as quickly as possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We should have somebody keeping an eye behind. Did you notice the snake people came up behind the lizard people?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yasha should stay with the healers for sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yasha can look behind. (whispering) Yasha! Behind!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I-- I have been."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The whole time! You, me, Jamedi, and Avantika in the front.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Avantika's in the front? With you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is that all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whatever. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have been spending this entire debate looking north and remembering everything that I saw on the way here from the boat and just calculating an exit strategy, because I remember the things that I saw on the way here.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Continuing on, the sun sets, and the sky goes through its cycle of oranges to pinks to purples to blues. You haven't quite reached this aforementioned ruin before night falls. Now the evening insects begin to grow louder and louder. The nocturnal creatures begin to let out the nocturnal calls. The perpetual din of the various clicks and cricket noises and other various flapping insects' mating calls into the night become this constant droning sound around you. While the insect bites have subsided, this sound itself is uncomfortable. For those of you who are used to more comfortable sleep, you begin to dread the possibility of finding a night's rest in this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whatever. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have been spending this entire debate looking north and remembering everything that I saw on the way here from the boat and just calculating an exit strategy, because I remember the things that I saw on the way here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Good to know. Now that enough time has passed and Jamedi feels comfortable he puts his hand down and goes, "All right, we press forward. Follow me, I feel we'll have to make camp soon. There is a ruin in front that might give us some cover." Continuing on?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Jamedi, what if it was his dick that was the snake though?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He keeps his eyes trained forward but goes, "I imagine it would be difficult to relieve oneself."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Probably.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Or masturbate!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He turns around and goes, "Shh! It is a valid point, but I need you to be quiet, please."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good riddance.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Continuing on, the sun sets, and the sky goes through its cycle of oranges to pinks to purples to blues. You haven't quite reached this aforementioned ruin before night falls. Now the evening insects begin to grow louder and louder. The nocturnal creatures begin to let out the nocturnal calls. For those of you who are used to more comfortable sleep, you begin to dread the possibility of finding a night's rest in this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whatever. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have been spending this entire debate looking north and remembering everything that I saw on the way here from the boat and just calculating an exit strategy, because I remember the things that I saw on the way here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Good to know. Now that enough time has passed and Jamedi feels comfortable he puts his hand down and goes, "All right, we press forward. Follow me, I feel we'll have to make camp soon. There is a ruin in front that might give us some cover." Continuing on?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Jamedi, what if it was his dick that was the snake though?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He keeps his eyes trained forward but goes, "I imagine it would be difficult to relieve oneself."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Probably.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Or masturbate!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He turns around and goes, "Shh! It is a valid point, but I need you to be quiet, please."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good riddance.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Who's keeping watch on this first bit of a night travel?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Caleb, if you do the bubble thing, can the insects come in the bubble? Can you make it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, Jester, doesn't it glow?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm able to affect its color and have it match. It still looks like a very smooth bubble that is 8-feet tall-- maybe not that big, but it can match the general color.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Just be dark and not attract any other attention?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it does not glow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then do it please!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah-- this is great.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I spend the next 11 minutes, I pull out the book, unholster it and start doing a ritual cast, ja?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ritual cast of?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Leomund's tiny hut. Is this where we want to do it, Jester?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: This is where we're camping though, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Jamedi says, "Perhaps we wait until we get to the ruin, just so we have some cover beyond the trees."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, just a little longer then.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That finishes Caduceus' turn. It's now their turn. The one up top who's hissing down at you, (long exhale). As its jaw opens, this semi-translucent rolling cloud of dust and gas emanates in a 30-foot-cone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So I can see that, huh?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see a faint bit of energy coming out of Caduceus.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Help!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is that your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That is, unless I can try and move away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're prone, so it's half movement to try and crawl away. Or you can spend half your movement to get up and then you still have half your movement to try and escape if you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to try and half my movement to get up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. So you get up from prone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, that's good. I thought he was like on top of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to back up against you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: To here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Won't he get an attack of opportunity?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Will he get an attack of opportunity?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can go right there and not get an attack of opportunity.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, perfect. That way if you get poisoned, I can un-poison you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: If you get poisoned, I can un-poison you!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Cool.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. That ends your go. It's now their turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm at four.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's getting Vampiric Touch. That means he'll get to heal a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It lasts. That's 17?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that hits. Roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was close. Seven points of damage. So I get three back?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You heal three back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So now I am at seven hit points. Now I'm going to vanish. I'm going to disappear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You turn invisible.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to turn invisible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Until the end of your next turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. I'm going to circle around and back off. Yeah. Then take a couple steps back. See if anything happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It hears you moving and swipes out. It has disadvantage on the strike. The snakes swing out towards you. That is a 14 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That misses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You dodge out of the way. The snakes all snap out in the middle of the air.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to get a little further out. I'm not going to go off the board or anything. That's fine.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Jester, you come to consciousness and you're half-curled on Avantika, who's half-curled on you since you guys passed out right next to each other.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What did you use to attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What did you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I shot it with the thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll light it up with this crackling green Eldritch Blast energy coming from both of my palms, causing its fur to smoke and burn off and its snake heads to repel!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, that's so visceral and amazing. I'll shoot it in the nose.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Its torso erupts in green flame and energy, just (explosion). The body slinks to the ground in a smoldering cinder and as it's head (moaning), (arrow impact).

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll look over at Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys all take a moment. Make a perception check of the jungle around you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, who? All of us?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All of us. Six.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Jester's asleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Three.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Quick! Hey, hey, hey!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 13, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Keep hitting me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey! Fjord! She needs some mouth-to-mouth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can use an action to wake her.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You finish your watch, seemingly uneventful. Towards the tail end of it, you do see a shape of another one of those leopard-like creatures that stalks on the outskirts of the strange, opaque orb you've created and approaches it. (sniffing) Circles around it for a bit, prods at it every now and then. Spends about 40 minutes or so keeping a watch and then eventually loses interest and wanders off into the jungle.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (gasps) Oh, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What is Frumpkin's armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'm sure it's terrible. Hold on a second.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Go to the creature tab on D&D Beyond.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I am. It is 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin suffers five points of piercing damage as Avantika instinctually (slashing, panting).

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Why did you do that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Why did you do that?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You know why I did that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "And you know why I did that."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ey.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Be glad it was just your owl. Please do not go peering where it is not wanted, eh?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Don't mind me while I make another owl. I begin casting Find Familiar to bring back Frumpkin as a one-ounce owl. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Recycling Frumpkin.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I promised Beauregard an owl for a week, so I can't have my cat back. Ten minutes later, there's an owl. Watch is over.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Just kind of (sighs)... you're not quite sure why it's come over you. Pressing on, Jamedi leads you for about another hour and a half, two hours through the jungle before putting his hand up once more to stop you all. Oh we didn't make the stealth check actually. Because I said when come back, yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's like a synth wave album.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is true. We are... wolfstarumbra (synth noises).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wolfstar is a total space cowboy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's true. Sorry, wolfstar.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, wolfstar!

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So now in the early morning daylight--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll be right back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Keep going.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the early morning daylight on Urukaxl Island, you trudge deeper and deeper into the jungles, as the low mist in the jungle begins to burn away as the day itself grows warmer. All of you getting a bit more adjusted to the temperature and general atmosphere. Beau, you're feeling a little rough.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ah?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You get this sweating a little bit and this soreness in your body and this general body pain, kind of a dull pain throughout.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You've got mono.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nope. I'm great.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As the light hits you as you leave the branches of the jungle and begin shifting, fully open now in the middle of the midday sun, immediately you feel the heat on the back of your neck and shoulders begin to grow hotter and hotter as the nerves build up inside. You cruise through the open area, and to the left you hear a (whip cracking). You glance over and you can see another one of those massive, mostly-snake, serpentine hulking individuals is currently wielding a whip. There is a cluster of lizardmen that are currently chained and are currently pushing on a heavy bar that is dragging a large piece of stone out of the jungle and towards the center of the city. They're bent into slave labor for these people. They are now pushing it forward. That catches you off guard for a minute, but you continue to focus and move forward. As you get closer, you can hear the slick sound of the flesh being pulled from the back of the lizardman's body-- (wet ripping)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I follow your lead, captain.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's go that way. We'll go towards the flaying.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You make your way, exiting the jungle way, and are you going quickly and quietly so nobody notices or are you strolling through, using your stealth as a means of trying to keep any sort of--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Trying to blend in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Got you. Okay. All of you move forward. Are you dragging them behind by ropes?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, we're in the middle. We're Assassin's Creeding it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Got you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If there is a building to walk beside, I would prefer to have our shittily drawn and one very nice one closest to the building with us on the outside.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Uh-huh. Yeah, I'll be the barrier.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Mama elephants and then baby elephants.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Aww, yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys cluster and begin to shift as this herd of snakefolk making your way towards that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, oh god, oh god.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You were tying them up and (gasping) begins to-- but we'll get to that in just a minute.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ja. They would kill us; we watched them skinning the inhabitants of this--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's a five.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Will they wake up if we hurt them now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck it. I summon the sword, I run over, and I shove it into his chest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's your DC?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of them succeeds.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're already tying him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're in the process of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He kills one guy. I snap the other guy's neck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The guys that's paralyzed, going ahead and attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I plunged the sword into his chest.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Attack twice, each time with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both hits are crits because he is paralyzed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Amazing. That is a 16?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are they automatic crits?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, the damage is a crit. The second one is a 23. Yeah, 23 is the highest one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep, both hit, both crit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Both hit, both crit, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You said one saved?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One saved.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But we were putting things into their mouths.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Falls to the ground and begins chuckling, though in the middle of this chaos it is now blinded and laughing. It releases you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I take the sword and take a shot right at his wrist that's holding her? With the hand that's holding onto Jester?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure. It's going to be at a major penalty.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So go ahead and roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17? Okay. Go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy, this is going terribly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's going great, we're doing good. Oh, that's good! That's a 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll say that'll give you advantage on your next check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't break the hold.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will step forward and say to the beast  How does the Lucidian Ocean say goodbye? It just waves. And I'll cast Tasha's Hideous Laughter on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Natural four. (cheering)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: We got a week.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Behind the fountain, you see one jet black-gray humanoid body. It's a little larger than the others with a giant, extended snake head. The cobra hood, long and wide on each side. Its eyes glowing red from the back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I begin casting Slow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And we'll get to that next week. (shrieks of disappointment)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit! The big black cobra hood, arms or just the serpentine body?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a slender humanoid body that's tall and thin, but its body is gray scaled and armor plates and then, from its shoulders, it extends up into the hooded cobra head.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Taller than the other three that were in the chamber?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's probably about seven-foot tall, and the others are about five-and-a-half, six-foot tall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's skip and go to the next episode!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: We all got shit to do in the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I begin casting Slow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And we'll get to that next week. (shrieks of disappointment)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit! The big black cobra hood, arms or just the serpentine body?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a slender humanoid body that's tall and thin, but its body is gray scaled and armor plates and then, from its shoulders, it extends up into the hooded cobra head.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Taller than the other three that were in the chamber?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's probably about seven-foot tall, and the others are about five-and-a-half, six-foot tall.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's skip and go to the next episode!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We got a week.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Don't we have that little box that appears that's just counting down from ten, nine, eight, and it's going to automatically skip to the fight right now, right? We can just hit it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!
